This is accurate; no malicious code or behavior is detected.\n\n- **Obfuscated score:**  \n  All assign **0**. The code is clear, autogenerated, and not obfuscated.\n\n- **Security risk / overall risk:**  \n  Given the nature of the code (a simple contract wrapper), the risk is minimal.
